languages.text: "Звучит весьма таинственно. Мне хотелось бы знать больше".

traits.locale_text: "Звучит весьма таинственно. Мне хотелось бы знать больше".

languages.text: "That sounds most mysterious. I would like to know more."
languages.original_text: "Звучит весьма таинственно. Мне хотелось бы знать больше".

traits.locale_text: "That sounds most mysterious. I would like to know more."
"That sounds most mysterious. I would like to know more."
"That sounds most mysterious. I would like to know more."

languages.text: 「それはとてもミステリアスね。もっと知りたい」
languages.original_text: "That sounds most mysterious. I would like to know more."

traits.locale_text: 「それはとてもミステリアスですね。もっと知りたいです。」

languages.text: "Kulağa çok gizemli geliyor. Daha fazlasını bilmek isterim."
languages.original_text: "That sounds most mysterious. I would like to know more."

traits.locale_text: "Kulağa çok gizemli geliyor. Daha fazlasını bilmek isterim."

languages.text: «Qué misterioso suena eso. Me gustaría saber más».
languages.original_text: "That sounds most mysterious. I would like to know more."

traits.locale_text: «Qué misterioso suena eso. Me gustaría saber más».

languages.text: “这听上去很神秘。我想要了解更多详情。”
languages.original_text: "That sounds most mysterious. I would like to know more."

traits.locale_text: “这听上去很神秘。我想要了解更多详情。”

languages.text: « Voilà qui paraît bien mystérieux. J'aimerais en savoir plus. »
languages.original_text: "That sounds most mysterious. I would like to know more."

traits.locale_text: « Voilà qui paraît bien mystérieux. J'aimerais en savoir plus. »

languages.text: "Das klingt sehr mysteriös. Ich wüsste gerne mehr."
languages.original_text: "That sounds most mysterious. I would like to know more."

traits.locale_text: "Das klingt sehr mysteriös. Ich wüsste gerne mehr."
